common.tagline: Learn Anything. Your AI Knows How.

hero.title: Learn Anything.
hero.subtitle: A personal AI tutor that adapts to how you learn, tracks your progress in real-time, and prepares you efficiently for any goal.
hero.aiWaiting: AI is waiting for your response...
hero.aiHonest: Our AI corrects you when you're wrong — like a real teacher, not a yes-man.

features.title: Why
features.subtitle: Not just another course platform. A teacher that knows you.
features.adaptiveDesc: The AI adjusts content format, difficulty, and pace based on how YOU learn best.
features.trackingDesc: Every session, every answer, every pattern — tracked and analyzed to optimize your learning.
features.honestDesc: Our AI corrects you when you're wrong, no matter how much you insist. Like a real teacher.
features.panicDesc: Exam tomorrow? Panic Mode creates a laser-focused plan based on what you still need to learn.
features.knowledgeDesc: See what you know, what you don't, and what you're about to forget — all visualized.
features.funDesc: XP, levels, streaks, 50+ achievements, and leaderboards. No pay-to-win.

auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to start learning
auth.name: Full Name
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link

learn.title: Explore Courses
learn.subtitle: Find your next learning adventure. AI personalizes every course for you.
learn.aiPersonalizedDesc: content difficulty and format adapt to your learning style as you progress.

aiChat.title: AI Study Buddy
aiChat.subtitle: Ask anything. I'll teach, not just answer.
aiChat.whatToLearn: What would you like to learn?
aiChat.imYourTutor: I'm your AI tutor. I adapt to your level, correct you when wrong, and help you truly understand.
aiChat.placeholder: Ask me anything... (Shift+Enter for new line)
aiChat.honest: Granted Path AI teaches honestly — it will correct you when you're wrong.

voice.title: Voice AI Tutor
voice.subtitle: Natural conversation practice with Claude
voice.proTipText: Speaking practice is most effective in 10–15 minute focused sessions. Claude will gently correct pronunciation and grammar without interrupting your flow.
voice.tapToStart: Tap the mic to start speaking

pronunciation.title: Pronunciation Practice
pronunciation.speakNow: Speak now — tap the mic when done
pronunciation.tapToRecord: Tap mic to record your attempt

aiCoach.title: AI Coach
aiCoach.subtitle: Weekly 1-on-1 sessions that push back, not cheer you on
aiCoach.sessionDesc: I've reviewed your week. I have 3 questions for you — some will feel uncomfortable. That's the point. Sessions average 15–20 minutes.

aiPlanner.title: AI Study Planner
aiPlanner.subtitle: Adaptive weekly schedule built around your energy, deadlines, and weak points
aiPlanner.changeGoalDesc: e.g., "I have an exam May 20", "only 30 min/day this week"

examPredictor.title: AI Exam Predictor
examPredictor.subtitle: Topic predictions based on exam history, curriculum weight, and your weak points

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Two-factor authentication, active sessions, and login history
security.twoFactorEnabled: Your account is protected by an authenticator app. You'll be prompted for a code at each new login.
security.twoFactorDisabled: Add an extra layer of security. We recommend enabling 2FA — it takes 2 minutes and stops 99% of account takeovers.
security.scanQRDesc: Use Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, or any TOTP app.

goals.title: Goals
goals.subtitle: Track your learning goals and deadlines.

knowledgeMap.title: Knowledge Map
knowledgeMap.subtitle: Visualize what you know, what you're learning, and what you're forgetting.

beta.title: Private Beta · 2026
beta.heading: Be among the first
beta.subtitle: We're opening a private beta for people who actually want to learn — not people who want to feel productive. Real AI tutoring, real results, real honest feedback.
beta.noSpam: No spam. We'll email you only when your access is ready.
beta.whenReady: when your invitation is ready. Expected wait: 2–4 weeks.
beta.whyJoinSubtitle: We're keeping the initial cohort small to give everyone real attention. Early believers get permanent perks.
beta.halfOffDesc: Lock in half price on any plan, forever, the moment you join.
beta.priorityAccessDesc: Skip the general launch queue and get in the week we go live.
beta.foundingBadgeDesc: Permanent profile badge recognizing you as an early believer.
beta.shapeProductDesc: Direct line to the team — your feedback drives the roadmap.
beta.whatToExpect: What to expect in the beta
beta.readyToLearn: Ready to learn what you've been putting off?
beta.readySubtitle: Join the waitlist. No credit card. No spam. Just honest AI tutoring when it's ready.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.subject: Subject

mobile.title: Your AI tutor,
mobile.subtitle: The full Granted Path experience on iOS and Android. Voice conversations, offline lessons, smart reminders, and genuine AI coaching — everywhere you go.
mobile.builtForLearning: Built for how you actually learn
mobile.builtSubtitle: Every feature is designed around one principle: respect your time and push you forward.
mobile.aiPocketDesc: Ask anything, get explanations tailored to what you already know. Works offline for saved lessons.
mobile.voiceDesc: Practice pronunciation and speaking naturally with your AI tutor — anywhere, anytime.
mobile.offlineDesc: Download lessons and flashcards. Your progress syncs automatically when you're back online.
mobile.notifDesc: Personalized reminders based on your peak learning hours — not nagging schedule spam.
mobile.microDesc: Learn in the gaps: waiting in line, on the bus, between meetings. Every minute counts.
mobile.syncDesc: Start on mobile, continue on desktop. Your AI tutor remembers every conversation.
mobile.scanDesc: Point your phone camera at the QR code and tap the link. Auto-detects iOS or Android.
mobile.freeToStart: Free to start. No credit card.
mobile.installApp: Install the app and start your first lesson in under 60 seconds.

errors.pageNotFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. No worries — let's get you back on track.
errors.errorDesc: An unexpected error occurred. We've been notified and are looking into it. Try reloading — sometimes that's all it takes.
errors.offlineDesc: No internet connection right now. Your progress is safe — it'll sync automatically when you're back online.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

onboarding.title: Let's personalize your learning
onboarding.step1: What do you want to learn?
